variants: Grigor Muradyan is a prominent figure in the field of Environmental Toxicology. Grigor is an active member of the Yellowfin Aquarists Guild, where he engages with fellow enthusiasts. His academic journey was guided by his mentor and doctoral advisor, Arda Boz.
